arts.ttl: Manchester United legends David Beckham and Gary Neville spotted watching Wrexham play Birmingham
arts.sum: The two former Manchester United and England stars were at a star-studded League One clash pitting Wrexham, owned by Ryan Reynolds and Rob McElhenney, against NFL star Tom Brady's Birmingham

arts.ttl: Team News: Manchester United vs. Barnsley injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's EFL Cup clash between Manchester United and Barnsley.

arts.ttl: Manchester United receive huge injury boost with first-team midfielder
arts.sum: Mason Mount sustained a minor muscle injury last month and he's now close to a return for Man United.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag comments on Jadon Sancho speak volumes for Antony's Man United future
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag delivered a familiar warning when he was asked about Antony's playing time - which will have resonated with Chelsea loanee Jadon Sancho.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer explains Marcus Rashford criticism after goalscoring performance
arts.sum: Shearer, scorer of a record 260 Premier League goals, suggested that criticism of Rashford has been justified, but that it isn't warranted if he continues to perform as he did at Southampton. Premier League legend Alan Shearer has refused to back down from recent Marcus Rashford criticism, but was impressed with how the forward performed in Manchester United's win over Southampton in the club's most recent outing at the weekend.

arts.ttl: Man Utd star Rashford put in his place
arts.sum: Alan Shearer has responded to Marcus Rashford after the Manchester United star lashed out at his critics. Premier League legend Alan Shearer has been one of Man Utd's harshest critics in recent times and he has now responded to the comments attributed to Rashford on The Rest is Football .

arts.ttl: Manchester United signing has gone from outcast to undroppable in just nine games
arts.sum: Man Utd got back to winning ways at the weekend and it was another excellent afternoon for one of their most exciting players.

arts.ttl: It’s significant – Man Utd boss Erik ten Hag stresses importance of Carabao Cup
arts.sum: United host League One Barnsley in the third round of the competition on Tuesday evening.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag sends warning to Antony over his 'attitude' ahead of Carabao Cup tie against Barnsley amid the £86m Man United star's lack of game time this season after falling down the pecking order
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: The Brazil star has made just one appearance this season as an 89th-minute substitute at Brighton, and will be hoping to get his first start in the third-round tie against Barnsley.

arts.ttl: Every word Erik ten Hag said in Man United press conference as double injury boost confirmed
arts.sum: A full recap of everything Man United manager Erik ten Hag had to say in his pre-Barnsley press conference at Carrington on Monday afternoon.
